meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use an Antigravity project template and Claude Code to overcome the 'no portfolio' problem. A high-impact guide for beginner AI builders.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is solved by shipping high-fidelity, functional SaaS projects rapidly. By leveraging the Antigravity project template alongside Claude Code, you bypass boilerplate fatigue, allowing you to focus on core logic and UI/UX. This workflow transforms you from a student learner into a professional-grade AI builder.
content.intro:
You stare at the blank GitHub repository, the cursor blinking like a heartbeat you can’t quite sustain. You have the theoretical knowledge, but your portfolio is a desert of unfinished tutorials and 'Hello World' clones. The anxiety of the job market feels like a wall, and every recruiter’s gaze seems to scream, 'Show me something real.'

It is time to stop building tutorials and start shipping products. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you inherit the architectural muscle memory of a senior engineer. When paired with the raw velocity of Claude Code, you aren't just writing lines of code; you are deploying production-ready applications that prove your capability to the world.

steps.title: Bootstrap with Antigravity
steps.description: Initialize your project structure to ensure professional standards from the first commit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity standard template with authentication and database integration.

steps.title: Define the Value Prop
steps.description: Use Claude to articulate the 'Why' behind your project to ensure it solves a real user problem.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the project structure and suggest three high-impact features that solve a common productivity bottleneck for students.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Identify three MVP features for a task management app that would impress a senior engineering hiring manager.'

steps.title: Implement Core Logic
steps.description: Focus on the business logic while the AI handles the repetitive syntax and type definitions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the backend service layer for user task management using the Antigravity patterns provided in the template.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the service layer for tasks based on the existing database schema.'

steps.title: Integrate Professional UI
steps.description: Ensure your frontend matches the quality of your backend by using the template's integrated design system.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive dashboard component that displays active tasks using the Antigravity UI library.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add a dashboard component with Tailwind CSS styling that matches the Antigravity design guidelines.'

steps.title: Testing and Deployment
steps.description: Verify your code quality and push to production to make your portfolio live.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write unit tests for the core business logic and prepare a deployment configuration file.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate vitest unit tests for the task service and verify the build configuration.'

pro_tips: Always commit your work with descriptive, conventional-commit messages; it demonstrates professional maturity to recruiters.
Focus on one 'hero' feature that solves a niche problem, rather than building a generic CRUD app that nobody uses.
Use Claude Code to document your API endpoints automatically; it saves hours and shows you value maintainability.
Deploy your project to a live URL using Vercel or Netlify immediately—a live link is worth 100 lines of code in a readme.
Refactor your AI-generated code manually at least once to ensure you understand every line; never ship code you cannot explain in an interview.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, document the 'lessons learned' in a blog post, link it to your GitHub repository, and begin your second project using a more complex template.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student; you are a builder with a live, production-grade project. The gap between you and your dream career is just one successful deployment away. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
